name: zrndr_span_mmx_set_pixel_format_masks
description: zRndr::SpanMmxSetPixelFormatMasks replicates 555/565 pixel-format masks into the MMX row tables.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 2 unmasked mismatches after masking 96 relocation bytes; the source now matches the original unrolled reverse-lane store order, with the remaining difference limited to zero-extended versus sign-extended encoding of the 0xffe0 immediate before identical 16-bit stores.
The native smoke verifies both 5:5:5 and 5:6:5 green/red packed mask replication in the MMX mask tables.
